calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing Re: Insurance Company Of The West?S Request For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Pacific Gold Milk Products, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Ivo Daniele, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Insurance Company of the West.
Kim Granfors, Surety Recovery Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Daniele and Ms. Granfors appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Pacific Gold Milk Products, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on November 15, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Pacific Gold Milk Products, Inc.'s Agent of Process occurred on January 28, 2020, and was effectuated on February 8, 2020.
Default as to defendant Pacific Gold Milk Products, Inc. was entered on April 1, 2020.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Insurance Company of the West, and against the defaulted defendant Pacific Gold Milk Products, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $237,017.55.
Prejudgment Interest - $38,182.55.
Costs - $1,126.59.

Total - $276,326.69.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
